mapper.sql: select a.*, c.custom_name,d.user_name as applicant_name,e.user_name as approved_name from wms_outbound_application a
mapper.select: select a.id, a.document_no, a.document_no_id, a.business_type, a.customer_id, a.document_status, a.contract_type, a.application_type, a.applicant, a.application_date, a.application_status, a.approved, a.approved_date, a.approved_status, a.approved_comments, a.remark, b.id as sub_id, b.outbound_application_id as sub_outbound_application_id, b.material_id as sub_material_id, b.warehouse_id as sub_warehouse_id, b.warehouse_area_id as sub_warehouse_area_id, b.warehouse_seat_id as sub_warehouse_seat_id, b.outbound_number as sub_outbound_number, b.batch_number as sub_batch_number, c.custom_name,d.user_name as applicant_name,e.user_name as approved_name from wms_outbound_application a left join wms_outbound_application_details b on b.outbound_application_id = a.id LEFT JOIN scm_sale_custom c ON a.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user d ON a.applicant = d.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user e ON a.approved = e.user_id where a.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_outbound_application
document_no, document_no_id, business_type, customer_id, document_status, contract_type, application_type, applicant, application_date, application_status, approved, approved_date, approved_status, approved_comments, remark,
#{documentNo}, #{documentNoId}, #{businessType}, #{customerId}, #{documentStatus}, #{contractType}, #{applicationType}, #{applicant}, #{applicationDate}, #{applicationStatus}, #{approved}, #{approvedDate}, #{approvedStatus}, #{approvedComments}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from wms_outbound_application where id in
#{id}

delete from wms_outbound_application_details where outbound_application_id in
#{outboundApplicationId}
mapper.insert:
insert into wms_outbound_application_details( id, outbound_application_id, material_id, warehouse_id, warehouse_area_id, warehouse_seat_id, outbound_number, batch_number) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.outboundApplicationId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.warehouseId}, #{item.warehouseAreaId}, #{item.warehouseSeatId}, #{item.outboundNumber}, #{item.batchNumber})
